final:
module RefModule(
    input [23:0] ZN,
    input [7:0] ZEN,
    input ZS,
	 input CLK,
    output reg [23:0] ZN1,
    output reg [7:0] ZEN1,
    output reg ZS1
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
ZN1<=ZN;
ZEN1<=ZEN;
ZS1<=ZS;
end
endmodule
